Hours

Friday: 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM (or by appointment)

Closed on Statutory Holidays

Phone hours: Monday – Thursday: 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM, 1:00 PM – 3:00 PM. Friday: 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM.

Send a Message

As a specialist practice, you will need a referral from your family doctor or optometrist.
